steps.title: Use the visibility clue
steps.content: The narrator says seasonal changes are less "obtrusive" in open land but still perceptible to a close observer. That contrast shows the word is about how noticeable or prominent the changes are.

steps.title: Reject unrelated meanings
steps.content: A means refusing to change, B means broad or wide-ranging, and C means rude. None fits the idea of changes being less noticeable yet still perceptible. The closest meaning is easily noticed or standing out. The answer is D.
